producer: QE 7.5 pw.x vc-relax + scf + ph.x electron_phonon='simple' @ vast.ai pod-2 (ssh9.vast.ai:15988, /root/wave3/YH10) — RTSC wave3 campaign job YH10, first terminal job of the 7-job grind. Aggregation parser /tmp/yh10_agg/agg.py (QE star-weighted lambda + lambda-weighted omega_log).
purpose: First measurement-grade verdict of the RTSC wave3 campaign. YH10 (YH_10) sodalite clathrate hydride el-ph coupling -> Allen-Dynes Tc. YH10 is a predicted high-Tc superconductor (Liu 2017 PNAS 114:6990; Peng 2017 PRL 119:107001 — Tc ~303 K at ~400 GPa predicted). This run probes our DFT pipeline at the relaxed-pressure point ~250 GPa.
system: YH10 sodalite clathrate, FCC-derived primitive cell (1 Y + 10 H = 11 atoms), vc-relaxed; CELL_PARAMETERS bohr [[-4.4344,0,4.4344],[0,4.4344,4.4344],[-4.4344,4.4344,0]], unit-cell volume 174.40 a.u.^3 (25.84 Ang^3), total energy -93.85937908 Ry, Fermi energy 20.1124 eV. PBE UPF (Y.UPF + H.UPF).

pressure.note: vc-relax converged to P=2499.98 kbar (~250 GPa). YH10 is a high-pressure phase; the Liu/Peng 2017 ~300 K prediction is at ~250-400 GPa. Our 250 GPa point is in-regime (clathrate cage stable, 0 imaginary modes). NOT ambient -> fails RTSC ambient-pressure gate.

method.stage_1_vcrelax: vc-relax, converged P=2499.98 kbar (criteria energy<1e-5 Ry, force<1e-4 Ry/Bohr, cell<0.5 kbar), final !total energy via subsequent scf -93.85937908 Ry
method.stage_2_scf: ibrav=0 nat=11 ntyp=2, ecutwfc=80 Ry, ecutrho=800 Ry, 12x12x12 k-grid, MP smearing degauss=0.02 Ry, conv_thr=1e-12
method.stage_3_phonon: ph.x DFPT ldisp 4x4x4 q (8 irreducible q-points, star weights [1,8,4,6,24,12,3,6] sum=64 = full BZ), electron_phonon='simple', el_ph_sigma=0.005 Ry x el_ph_nsigma=10 (broadenings 0.005-0.050 Ry), trans=.true., tr2_ph=1e-14, -np 6
method.qblocks_parsed: 8/8 (COMPLETE IBZ coverage at 4^3 q-grid; star multiplicities sum to 64 = 4x4x4 full BZ, no missing q)
method.moments: BZ-weighted lambda = sum_q w_q * sum_mode lambda(q,mode) / sum_q w_q (33 modes/q); lambda-weighted log-average omega_log; Allen-Dynes Tc with mu*=0.10 and 0.13. lambda(q,nu) taken VERBATIM from QE ph.out (QE already applies lambda=gamma/(pi N(Ef) omega^2) normalization in elph_simple).
method.chain_status: chain.log: vc-relax JOB DONE / scf JOB DONE / ph JOB DONE / CHAIN DONE 2026-05-28T09:47:43Z. STOP=0 err=0.

q_grid.completeness_note: All 8 IBZ q-points computed (each with full 33-mode freq table + 10 broadening el-ph blocks). Star weights sum to 64 = full 4x4x4 BZ. NO missing q (d6 partiality does NOT apply).

dos_at_Ef_states_per_spin_per_Ry.note: DOS broadening-dependent (Gaussian double-delta); reported as the in-cell value at each el_ph_sigma.

results_by_broadening.note: under-converged (smearing too small, double-delta under-sampled — lambda inflated)

primary_verdict.broadening_choice: el_ph_sigma=0.020 Ry — matches scf MP degauss=0.02 Ry (self-consistent), sits at the center of the converged lambda plateau (0.010-0.030 Ry spans lambda 2.51-3.02).

m_sign.interpretation: POSITIVE (m=+0.113 at primary lambda=2.82 > 2.5) -> strong-coupling side. m>0 across the entire converged plateau (sigma 0.015: m=+0.003, 0.020: m=+0.113, 0.025: m=+0.171). RTSC m-sign batch entry: YH10 = strong-coupling (lambda > 2.5).

stability.phonon_imaginary_modes: 0 across all 8 q-blocks (no frequency below -1 cm-1; clathrate cage dynamically stable at relaxed ~250 GPa)
stability.metastability_note: YH10 is a high-pressure phase (~250 GPa here; literature stability ~250-400 GPa). Pressure-stable, NOT ambient. Not RTSC (fails ambient-pressure gate).

verify_verbatim.host: mini (verify host pin per memory: ubu-2 segfault, ubu-1 broken)
verify_verbatim.mu_star_0.10: verify --expr allen_dynes_tc(2.8197,1300.43,0.1)=227.501 | calc = 227.501  ~= expected 227.501  (within tol 0.01, calc=227.501 vs expected=227.501, |delta|=0.000133986) | tier = GREEN SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (round-tolerant: literature-rounded value within opt-in --tol 0.01, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)
verify_verbatim.mu_star_0.13: verify --expr allen_dynes_tc(2.8197,1300.43,0.13)=215.916 | calc = 215.916  ~= expected 215.916  (within tol 0.01, calc=215.916 vs expected=215.916, |delta|=0.0003738) | tier = GREEN SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL  (round-tolerant: literature-rounded value within opt-in --tol 0.01, TECS-L n6-rep Tier2)

verdict_tier: GREEN — measured-grade DFT el-ph prediction. Complete 4x4x4-q IBZ, dynamically stable, lambda=2.82 (strong-coupling), Allen-Dynes Tc = 216-228 K (mu* 0.13-0.10) at ~250 GPa. Tc closed-form VERIFIED hexa-native (allen_dynes_tc, GREEN SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL, both mu*). This is a HIGH-Tc verdict (NOT low-Tc / closed-negative). Honest caveat: 4x4x4 q-grid is coarse (the published ~300 K YH10 figure uses denser grids + higher pressure ~400 GPa); our 250 GPa point gives a self-consistent 216-228 K. Pressure-bound (not ambient) -> not RTSC by ambient gate.
verdict: RTSC wave3 first terminal verdict. YH10 @ ~250 GPa: lambda_BZ = 2.82 (sigma=0.020 Ry, center of 0.010-0.030 plateau spanning 2.51-3.02), omega_log = 1300 K, Allen-Dynes Tc = 227.5 K (mu*=0.10) / 215.9 K (mu*=0.13), both hexa-verified GREEN. Strong-coupling (m-sign +). Dynamically stable, complete IBZ. Confirms YH10 as a high-Tc strong-coupling hydride superconductor in-silico at the relaxed pressure; consistent in lambda-ladder with the CaH6 (lambda 3.4-4.4) and H3S anchors. Pressure-bound, not ambient.
honesty_notes: q-grid COMPLETE (8/8 IBZ, weights sum 64 = full BZ) — d6 partiality does NOT apply.
sigma=0.005 Ry result (lambda=4.42) is under-converged double-delta and EXCLUDED from the verdict; primary uses sigma=0.020 = scf degauss for self-consistency.
This is a high-Tc (216-228 K), NOT a low-Tc/closed-negative result (g63 — surfaced regardless).
Tc lower than the literature ~300 K because (a) pressure here ~250 GPa vs ~400 GPa in Peng/Liu 2017, (b) 4x4x4 q-grid is coarse. Honest in-regime value, not forced (d6).
Pressure-bound phase (~250 GPa) -> NOT ambient RTSC; absorbed=false retained.

provenance.campaign: RTSC wave3 (7-job grind; YH10 = first terminal)
